name: pragmatic-ddd-monolith
description: Principle-level pragmatic DDD skill for single-deployment monoliths on a single database (OOP + DI stacks): two distinct boundaries (context vs layer), inward dependencies, CQS write/read split, one-way cross-context dependencies through a published contract (OHS + PL), and downstream Conformist vs ACL. Concrete naming and structure are team decisions recorded as ADRs.
author: dev-goraebap <dev.goraebap@gmail.com>
